'''Estalle Seaport''' was located in the [[Commercial District (Procopia)|Commercial District]] of [[Estalle Island]] and was the primary supply link with the rest of the planet [[Procopia/Legends|Procopia]] in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. The majority of the [[Foodstuff/Legends|consumables]] and commercial products sold on Estalle Island came through [[Estalle Harbor]].

{{Loc-stub}}
